steps.t: Côs Braen can be found in the southern edge of Laerlad. You should seek out the Ungoledan encampment of Côs Braen in Laerlad.
Radagast can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Radagast.
Odahild can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Odahild.
Radagast can be found in Blómgard. You should talk to Radagast.
